name: Chicken and Turkey Sausage Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Chicken, cut into serving size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin, fat, and wings from the chicken and discard.
2. Spray the inside of a large skillet with non-fat cooking spray and place over high heat. Brown the chicken, turning often. Remove the skillet from the heat and move the chicken pieces to a platter.
3. Add 1 cup of water to the skillet, scraping the bottom to loosen all of the browned bits. Return the chicken to the skillet and set aside.
4. Place the remaining 8 cups of water in a 5-quart Dutch oven over high heat and bring to a boil. Add the chicken and pan juices, along with the rest of the ingredients, except for the green onions and parsley. Cook, uncovered, 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in the onions and parsley and cook for 5 more minutes.
6. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
